data.title: Galaxy Digital's Equity Tokenization: Insights from Superstate Executives
data.description: Galaxy Digital and Superstate executives discussed the tokenization of Galaxy's equity onchain during Episode 70 of The Crypto Beat. According to NS3.AI, the conversation highlighted the regulatory and infrastructure challenges faced in the process. The executives also explored trading volume, adoption rates, and potential assets that could be tokenized next. The discussion provided insights into the evolving landscape of onchain asset management and the future possibilities for tokenization in the financial sector.

data.title: Ripple Releases Critical Update to Fix XRP Ledger Node Crash Issue
data.description: Ripple has announced the release of rippled version 3.1.2, addressing a critical issue that could cause public-facing XRP Ledger nodes to crash. According to NS3.AI, the XRP Ledger Foundation has advised operators to promptly update their systems and trust Ripple's newly rotated GPG key to avoid potential automatic upgrade failures. The identified bug can lead to an internal abort in certain edge cases, resulting in the termination of the server process.

data.title: Alleged Criminal Mastermind's Rise and Fall Explored
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the latest episode of the Big Take Asia podcast, where host Oanh Ha and Bloomberg's David Ramli delve into the swift ascent and abrupt decline of an alleged criminal mastermind. The discussion provides insights into the factors that contributed to this individual's rise and the circumstances leading to their downfall. The podcast aims to shed light on the complexities surrounding the case, offering listeners a comprehensive understanding of the events that unfolded.

data.title: Bittensor Rises 18% Amid Strong Futures Demand
data.description: Bittensor's price increased by 18%, reaching approximately $238. According to NS3.AI, a move above $250 could potentially pave the way for a rise to $273. This setup is contingent on robust futures demand. However, the significant long positioning makes TAO vulnerable to a sharper reversal if the support level does not hold.

data.title: Air Freight Prices Surge by 70% Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description: Air freight prices have increased by up to 70% since the onset of the conflict in Iran, according to recent reports. According to Jin10, industry experts highlight that the closure of Middle Eastern airspace and security concerns are significantly impacting the cost of routes between South Asia and Europe. The ongoing geopolitical tensions are causing disruptions in air logistics, leading to heightened costs and operational challenges for carriers operating in these regions.

data.title: Eni Explores Venezuelan Gas Export Opportunities
data.description: Italian energy giant Eni is exploring the potential to export gas from Venezuela, signaling the Caribbean nation's gradual reintegration into international markets. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this development as part of Venezuela's efforts to engage with global energy markets under a U.S.-supported interim administration. This move could mark a significant step in Venezuela's economic recovery and its re-entry into the global energy sector.

data.title: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Launches Attacks on Enemy Positions in Iraq and UAE
data.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has announced that it has carried out attacks on enemy positions in Erbil, Iraq, and Zafra, UAE. According to Jin10, the military action targets areas where hostile forces have gathered. The Revolutionary Guard's operations reflect ongoing regional tensions and military engagements. The specifics of the attacks, including the scale and impact, have not been detailed in the announcement. This development underscores the volatile geopolitical landscape in the Middle East, where various factions and nations are involved in complex conflicts.

data.title: Expert Predicts Bitcoin Could Deliver 10x Return Over Next Decade
data.description: Ric Edelman has expressed optimism about Bitcoin's potential, suggesting it could yield up to a tenfold return over the next ten years. According to NS3.AI, Edelman believes that Bitcoin's limited supply of 21 million coins and its current low adoption rate are key factors that could drive its future growth. He argues that these elements position Bitcoin to potentially outperform other asset classes in the coming decade.

data.title: Bitcoin Theft: French Couple Forced to Transfer €900,000 in Home Invasion
data.description: A couple residing near Versailles experienced a harrowing ordeal when they were compelled at knifepoint to transfer approximately €900,000 in Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, this incident is part of a growing trend of crypto-linked home invasions in France. French authorities are increasingly concerned about these attacks, which are now seen as a significant threat to private individuals, not just industry insiders. This pattern of crime is prompting Bitcoin holders and executives to adopt stricter personal security measures and more restrictive custody routines.

data.title: February ETF Flows: Capital Allocation Trends Across Asset Classes
data.description: In February, investors directed their capital across various asset classes, including equities and fixed income, as detailed in the latest ETF flow analysis. FactSet posted on X, highlighting the trends in capital allocation and the introduction of new ETFs during the month. The report provides insights into investor behavior and market dynamics, offering a comprehensive overview of where funds were allocated. This analysis is crucial for understanding the shifts in investment strategies and the factors influencing these decisions. The data reflects the ongoing adjustments in the financial markets, driven by economic conditions and investor sentiment.

data.title: Ukraine's Zelensky Meets with Reza Pahlavi in Paris to Discuss Iran's Situation
data.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky met with Reza Pahlavi, the son of the deposed Shah of Iran, in Paris to discuss the situation in Iran and the region. According to Jin10, the discussions focused on the actions of the U.S. towards the Iranian regime. Ukraine expressed its desire for a free Iran that does not collaborate with Russia or destabilize the Middle East, Europe, or the world.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 71,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.00% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 13, 2026, 17:58 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 71,000 USDT and is now trading at 70,970.992188 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.00% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Key Insights from the Game Developers Conference in San Francisco
data.description:
The Game Developers Conference in San Francisco this week highlighted several significant trends and developments in the gaming industry. Bloomberg posted on X, emphasizing the event's focus on job opportunities, the integration of artificial intelligence, and the evolving landscape of game development.

One of the primary topics was the surge in job opportunities within the gaming sector. Industry leaders discussed the growing demand for skilled professionals as companies expand their development teams to meet the increasing consumer interest in gaming.

Artificial intelligence was another focal point, with discussions centered around its potential to revolutionize game design and player experiences. Developers are exploring AI's capabilities to create more immersive and dynamic gaming environments.

The conference also addressed the challenges faced by developers, including the need for innovation and adaptation in a rapidly changing market. Attendees shared insights on overcoming these hurdles and leveraging new technologies to enhance game quality and engagement.

Additionally, the event provided a platform for networking and collaboration among industry professionals, fostering partnerships that could drive future advancements in gaming technology.

Overall, the Game Developers Conference underscored the industry's commitment to growth and innovation, highlighting the critical role of technology and talent in shaping the future of gaming.

data.title: U.S. Oil Production Hits Record High Amid Geopolitical Tensions
data.description: The White House Press Secretary Levitt announced that the United States is currently experiencing unprecedented levels of oil and natural gas production. According to Jin10, this record-breaking output is providing a safeguard against disruptions caused by Iran. The increased production is seen as a strategic advantage in maintaining stability in the face of geopolitical challenges.

data.title: Thai Oil Refiner Secures North Sea Forties Crude Amid Persian Gulf Supply Disruptions
data.description: A Thai oil refiner has acquired North Sea Forties crude from Trafigura Group, marking an unusual transaction as Asian processors seek alternatives to Middle Eastern supplies currently hindered in the Persian Gulf. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced by Asian refiners due to the ongoing supply disruptions in the region. The purchase underscores the increasing need for diversification in crude sources amid geopolitical tensions affecting traditional supply routes. This move reflects broader efforts by Asian oil processors to secure stable and reliable sources of crude oil, as uncertainties in the Persian Gulf continue to impact the market.

data.title: India Revises Listing Rules, Paving Way for Jio Platforms IPO
data.description: The Indian government has revised listing regulations, facilitating billionaire Mukesh Ambani's plans for an initial public offering of Jio Platforms Ltd., the digital division of Reliance Industries. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this regulatory change for Ambani's business strategy. The amendments are expected to streamline the process for Jio Platforms, enhancing its ability to attract investors and expand its market presence. This move aligns with India's broader efforts to boost its digital economy and support major corporate ventures. Ambani's Reliance Industries has been a key player in India's economic landscape, and the IPO of Jio Platforms is anticipated to be a major event in the financial markets.

data.title: Fitch Ratings: Mexican Banking Sector Faces U.S. Trade Headwinds
data.description: Fitch Ratings has highlighted potential challenges for the Mexican banking sector due to trade dynamics with the United States. According to Jin10, these headwinds are primarily driven by shifts in U.S. trade policies, which could impact Mexico's economic landscape and, consequently, its banking industry. The report underscores the importance of monitoring these developments as they may influence the financial stability and growth prospects of Mexican banks. Fitch Ratings suggests that stakeholders remain vigilant to navigate the evolving trade environment effectively.

data.title: Explosion Reported Near UAE Anchorage, Says Ambrey
data.description: A commercial vessel has reported hearing an explosion near the anchorage off the coast of Sharjah, United Arab Emirates, according to Ambrey, a UK maritime security company. The exact distance of the explosion from the vessel remains unclear. Further details about the incident are yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Missile Interception Occurs Amid UAE Attack, Reports Ambrey
data.description: A missile interception took place during an attack on the United Arab Emirates, according to a report by the UK maritime security company Ambrey. The incident was evaluated as part of the ongoing security challenges in the region. According to Jin10, the interception highlights the heightened tensions and security measures being implemented in response to regional threats. The specifics of the attack and the interception remain under investigation as authorities work to ensure maritime safety.

data.title: Petrobras CEO Confirms No Immediate Plans to Adjust Gasoline Prices
data.description: Petrobras CEO has announced that the company will not be considering any adjustments to gasoline prices in the near future. According to Jin10, this decision comes amidst ongoing discussions about market conditions and economic factors influencing fuel pricing. The CEO emphasized that Petrobras is closely monitoring the situation but does not foresee any immediate changes. This announcement aims to provide clarity to consumers and stakeholders regarding the company's pricing strategy.
